html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Columns Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. Columns can be built directly in other column to destroy the existing column. All columns except the Planed Wood Column emit light.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Columns Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code
Planed Wood Column Can't be crafted

Planed Wood Column		 ×1 "Holds up nicely." deco_wood

Millinery Column		 ×1 "Moderately refined." deco_millinery

Round Column		 ×1 "Round the bend." deco_round

Lit Marble Column		 ×5 "Lighten up the place." deco_marble

Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Columns Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.
Columns can be built directly in other column to destroy the existing column. All columns except the Planed Wood Column emit light.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Cột là một danh mục chế tạo dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới. Các cột có thể được xây dựng trực tiếp trong cột khác để phá hủy cột hiện có. Tất cả các cột ngoại trừ Cột Gỗ Bào đều phát ra ánh sáng.
title: Columns Tab

{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Columns.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Columns Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. Columns can be built directly in other column to destroy the existing column.
